details: The agent called the GitHub API tool to get the release by tag v2026.3.13-1, received the full release notes, and correctly identified and reported the first 3 items from 'What's Changed': (1) fix(compaction) by efe-arv, (2) fix(telegram) by obviyus, and (3) fix: handle Discord gateway metadata fetch failures by jalehman - all matching the known facts exactly.
